description: record a task's redemption to the done-ledger, gated on a verified governed validator run
rules: redeem ONLY on evidence — a governed RUN_LEDGER whose every step ran ok with no refusal event
bind to the right validator: if the evidence carries a task-ledger, its skill must match validated_by
append a prev-hash-chained entry; never edit a prior entry; idempotent per task_id
usage: Set SWARM_DIR, TASK_ID, RUN_LEDGER (the governed run-ledger evidencing the validator pass). Optional DONE_LEDGER (defaults to SWARM_DIR/done-ledger.json). Output: redeem.json.
limitation: Records that A clean governed validator run passed; full chain re-verification of the evidence is cws-ledgercheck's job, and tightening the validator-identity binding for runs that carry no task-ledger is follow-up.
